mapper.select:
SELECT ct.*, c.name AS customer_name FROM crm_contract ct LEFT JOIN crm_customer c ON ct.customer_id = c.id AND c.deleted_at IS NULL
ct.deleted_at IS NULL
AND (ct.title LIKE '%' || #{keywords} || '%' OR ct.contract_no LIKE '%' || #{keywords} || '%' OR c.name LIKE '%' || #{keywords} || '%')
AND ct.customer_id = #{customerId} AND ct.status = #{status} AND ct.created_at >= #{startDate}::timestamp AND ct.created_at <= #{endDate}::timestamp
ORDER BY ct.created_at DESC
